# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: AI-assisted DSA Practice with Real-time Editor and Azure OpenAI
- Summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI-assisted problem solving, real-time editor, and fresh Google authentication integration in a concise post highlighting the latest workflow and learning features.
- Slug: codegrind-demonstrates-ai-assisted-dsa-practice
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-demonstrates-ai-assisted-dsa-practice
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-08-codegrind-demonstrates-ai-assisted-dsa-practice.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind combines LeetCode-style challenges with an Azure OpenAI assistant, real-time code execution, and streamlined sign-in to deliver an engaging, hands-on DSA practice experience.
- CTA: Try CodeGrind now and level up your practice with AI guidance and instant feedback.
- Visual brief: A short demo-style video showing the CodeGrind interface: problem description on one side, live code editor with syntax highlighting, AI assistant chat panel, and a quick sign-in flow. Include subtle cyberpunk touches and UI glow to reflect the Code Breach theme. End with a call-to-action screen: 'Practice DSA with AI help at codegrind.online'.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
